content.text: I heard back from Lumenis Labs today—phone screen scheduled for Tuesday, 2026-04-14 at 10:00 AM PT with recruiter Alice Chen (30 minutes). Please update the status to phone_screen_scheduled, add an interview entry, and set a prep reminder the day before.
Bridgewave Health is still silent since I applied on 2026-04-01. If there’s no reply by 2026-04-08, please draft and send a polite follow-up referencing the ML Engineer role.
FYI: I used to track job applications with moltlog, but that workflow is retired. Let’s use data/applications.json as the source of truth from now on.
